common.title: Open Data Portal
common.description: Open Data Portal of the Republic of Serbia

homepage.hero_title: Welcome to the Open Data Portal of the Republic of Serbia!
homepage.hero_subtitle: Here you can learn more about available open datasets and use cases, and follow the latest developments in the world of open data
homepage.hero_description: The portal offers registration to all interested users, who can also publish both open data and use cases. Join our growing community!
homepage.datasets_description: Complete, up-to-date and raw data, available to everyone for free access, use and sharing.
homepage.organizations_description: Institutions and organizations publishing open data.
homepage.reuses_description: Insight into the potential of open data — from web applications to visualizations and maps.

hero.title: Serbian Public Data
hero.subtitle: The easiest way to explore Serbian public data

featuredExamples.title: Featured Examples
featuredExamples.subtitle: Real visualizations from official government data

problem.title: Why This Matters
problem.subtitle: Accessing government data shouldn't require technical expertise or legal teams.
problem.gap1Description: Official data exists, but is scattered across PDFs, legacy portals, and siloed systems. Finding what you need takes days, not minutes.
problem.gap2Description: Raw datasets require specialized tools and coding skills to analyze. Most citizens and journalists are locked out.
problem.gap3Description: International platforms ignore Serbian context. Localized geography, Cyrillic support, and national statistics are afterthoughts.

features.title: Built for Serbian Data
features.subtitle: A visualization platform designed around the reality of government information in Serbia.

serbianFirst.title: Serbian-First Design
serbianFirst.description: Full support for Cyrillic and Latin scripts. Geographic hierarchies match Serbian administrative regions. No localization workarounds.

realData.title: Real Public Data
realData.description: 28 interactive examples using actual government datasets. Demographics, healthcare, economy — explore real statistics, not mock data.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Built-In
accessibility.description: WCAG 2.1 AA compliant from the ground up. Screen reader support, keyboard navigation, and colorblind-safe palettes.

geography.title: Serbian Geography
geography.description: Built-in maps for municipalities, districts, and regions. Choropleth visualizations that understand Serbian administrative boundaries.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Fully transparent codebase. Customize for your organization, contribute improvements, or fork for your own data portal.

lowFriction.title: Start in Minutes
lowFriction.description: No account required to explore. Try the demo gallery instantly, or dive into documentation to build your own visualizations.

useCases.title: Who Uses This
useCases.subtitle: Simple access to public data for everyone

citizens.title: Citizens
citizens.description: Understand how public resources are allocated. Explore data about your municipality, healthcare, and regional development.

developers.title: Developers
developers.description: Embed visualizations in your applications. Use the open-source codebase to build custom data products.

comparison.title: Why Not Generic Tools?
comparison.subtitle: Built from day one for Serbian public data

genericLibrary.title: Generic Chart Libraries
genericLibrary.description: Popular JavaScript charting libraries that require extensive configuration for government data use cases.

developers.title: Developers
developers.subtitle: Embed Visualizations
developers.description: Use open source for your projects

finalCta.title: Ready to Explore?
finalCta.subtitle: See what Serbian public data can reveal

codeExample.title: For Developers
codeExample.subtitle: Embed visualizations in your applications with a few lines of code.
codeExample.description: The platform is built on standard web technologies. Customize chart configurations, integrate with your data pipeline, or contribute to the open-source codebase.

liveExamples.title: Live Examples
liveExamples.subtitle: Interactive visualizations powered by real Serbian government data.

gettingStarted.title: How It Works
gettingStarted.step1Description: Browse our catalog of open government datasets and find the data you need.
gettingStarted.step2Description: Create interactive charts and visualizations with our easy-to-use tools.
gettingStarted.step3Description: Share your visualizations with others or embed them in your website.

browse.title: Browse Datasets
browse.description: Search the official data.gov.rs catalog, narrow the results by metadata, and inspect dataset resources before building a visualization.
browse.no_results_hint: Try a broader search term or remove one of the filters.
browse.preview_limit: Showing the first 100 rows when a CSV or JSON resource is available.
browse.preview_error: Preview could not be loaded for this resource.
browse.preview_empty: No previewable CSV or JSON resource is available for this dataset yet.
browse.visualize_placeholder: The chart configurator route is not implemented yet. This placeholder confirms the browse flow can hand off a dataset safely without sending the user into a 404.

serbianDataLibrary.title: Serbian Government Data Library
serbianDataLibrary.description: Curated datasets from official Serbian statistical sources

states.unsupported: This chart type is not supported yet.

validation.pie_single_measure: Pie chart requires exactly one measure

preview.title: Chart preview
preview.description: Configure chart type and axis mapping
preview.no_config: Select a chart type and configure mapping

workspace.preview_description: Adjust the chart type and axis mapping on the left. The right side shows a live preview over the first rows of the selected resource.
workspace.no_preview: The selected dataset does not expose a CSV or JSON resource that can be safely loaded for chart configuration.
workspace.select_dataset: Choose a dataset from the browse view to open the chart workspace.

multiDataset.noMatchingColumns: No matching columns found. The datasets may not have compatible join dimensions.
multiDataset.lowOverlap: Low overlap ({{percent}}%). Verify columns are compatible.

templates.title: Choose a template
templates.selectTemplate: Select a starting layout for your dashboard
templates.hero_plus_two_desc: One large chart with two smaller below

footer.open_data_participate: Join the world of open data
footer.open_data_description: Open data contributes to economic growth, modernization of public administration, and better services for citizens.

errors.404_message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
errors.500_message: A server error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.network_error: Network error. Check your internet connection.
errors.generic_error: An error occurred. Please try again.

modal.title: Error
modal.failedToLoad: Failed to load data. Please check your connection and try again.

featured.description: Explore visualizations created from Serbian government data

gallery.description: Explore visualizations created by the community
gallery.tryDifferent: Try adjusting your search or filters

feedback.reportBugDescription: Report it so we can fix it fast
feedback.featureDescription: Submit requests to shape the future

demoGallery.title: Serbia Data Gallery
demoGallery.subtitle: 43 interactive visualizations with real government data

accessibilityPage.title: Accessibility Statement
accessibilityPage.subtitle: Our commitment to digital accessibility for citizens of Serbia

complianceLevel.title: Compliance Level
complianceLevel.description: This platform aims to conform to WCAG 2.1 Level AA (Web Content Accessibility Guidelines). We continuously work to ensure our visualizations and data are accessible to all citizens of Serbia.

keyboardNavigation.title: Keyboard Navigation
keyboardNavigation.description: All interactive elements are accessible via keyboard (Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter, Space, Escape, arrow keys).

chartTableAlternative.title: Chart Table Alternative
chartTableAlternative.description: Every chart has a "Show as table" button that displays data in a format optimized for screen readers.

ariaLabels.title: ARIA Labels
ariaLabels.description: Charts have aria-label and aria-describedby attributes describing chart type and content.

colorContrast.title: Color Contrast
colorContrast.description: All colors meet WCAG AA standard (contrast ratio ≥4.5:1 for text, ≥3:1 for graphical elements).

reducedMotion.title: Reduced Motion Support
reducedMotion.description: Platform respects prefers-reduced-motion system setting. Animations are disabled when this option is active.

colorblindPalettes.title: Colorblind-Safe Palettes
colorblindPalettes.description: Available palettes: Okabe-Ito, Viridis, Plasma, and Inferno, optimized for deuteranopia, protanopia, and tritanopia.

patternOverlays.title: Pattern Overlays
patternOverlays.description: Charts can use patterns (lines, dots, diagonals) in addition to colors for distinguishing categories.

keyboardNav.title: Keyboard Navigation
keyboardNav.description: All interactive elements can be accessed using a keyboard. Use Tab to navigate between elements, Enter or Space to activate buttons, and Escape to close dialogs.

accessibleCharts.title: Accessible Charts
accessibleCharts.description: Every chart on this platform includes an accessible data table. Click the "Show as table" button to view data in a format optimized for screen readers.
accessibleCharts.ariaLabelsDesc: ARIA labels describe chart type and content
accessibleCharts.dataSummaryDesc: Data summary includes highest, lowest, and average values
accessibleCharts.skipLinkDesc: Skip link for direct navigation to table

colorAccessibility.title: Color Accessibility
colorAccessibility.description: We provide multiple color palette options designed for different types of color vision deficiency. Switch palettes in chart configuration to find one that works best for you.
colorAccessibility.patternAlternativesDesc: Charts can use patterns (lines, dots, diagonals) in addition to colors for categories and regions.

reducedMotionSection.title: Reduced Motion
reducedMotionSection.description: If you prefer reduced motion, this platform respects your system preferences. Enable "Reduce motion" in your operating system settings, and all chart animations will be disabled.
reducedMotionSection.note: Supported via CSS media query prefers-reduced-motion.

knownLimitations.title: Known Limitations
knownLimitations.mapTiles: Some third-party map tiles may have color contrast issues
knownLimitations.multiSeriesCharts: Complex multi-series charts may be difficult to navigate without a screen reader
knownLimitations.abbreviations: Historical data tables may contain abbreviations without expansions
knownLimitations.scatterBubble: Scatter and bubble charts have limited screen reader support — use table alternative

testingScope.title: Testing Scope
testingScope.description: Accessibility is tested on the following browser and assistive technology combinations:
testingScope.testingNote: Automated testing: axe-core, Lighthouse. Manual testing: keyboard navigation, screen readers.

feedback.title: Report an Accessibility Issue
feedback.description: We are committed to providing an accessible experience for all users. If you encounter barriers or have suggestions for improvement, please contact us.
feedback.note: Note: The contact information above are examples. For actual contacts, see the About page.

footer.updateNote: This statement will be periodically updated as platform functionality evolves.
